vocab.meaning: một thánh đường của sự năng suất (nơi làm việc cực kỳ hiệu quả)
vocab.example: I've turned my attic into a sanctuary of productivity, where I can dive into complex subjects without being disturbed.
I actually find that a bit of ambient background noise in a coffee shop helps me focus better than total silence.
When I need to bounce ideas off my peers, I usually head to the communal study area in the student union.

vocab.meaning: được thiết kế theo chuẩn công thái học
vocab.example: My home office is ergonomically designed with a lumbar-support chair to prevent back pain during long study sessions.
There is a quiet corner tucked away at the back of the local library that remains undiscovered by most students.

vocab.meaning: đỉnh cao về khả năng nhận thức/tư duy
vocab.example: I try to be at my desk by 8 AM because that is when I reach my cognitive peak for the day.
I prefer a workspace with a minimalist aesthetic to avoid any visual clutter that might derail my train of thought.
It is essential for me to study in a well-ventilated room, as fresh air keeps me from feeling drowsy.

vocab.meaning: không khí học thuật sôi nổi
vocab.example: The university library has a vibrant academic atmosphere that motivates me to push through difficult assignments.

vocab.meaning: những sảnh đường thiêng liêng (nơi có truyền thống học tập lâu đời)
vocab.example: Studying within the hallowed halls of the old campus always fills me with a sense of inspiration and history.
